roa.docketEntryComment: PD BRIEF AND EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF RESENTENCEING FILED, PC 1170(D)
DA'S NOTICE OF MOTION & MOTION TO RESENTENCE FILED (TO SET)

/CAL RESENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC1170(D), CDC 	70492/X NICOLE FULLER APPERS FOR THE PEOPLE,/DEF:APPEARS VIA ZOOM FROM CALIFORNIA MEN'S COLONY IN SAN LUIS OBISPO/CTORD:GUILTY FINDING ON COUNT 1 SET ASIDE, AND MURDER CONVICTION OF COUNT 1 VACATED AND DISMISSED/X:COURT FURTHER ORDERS ALLEGATION PURSUANT TO PC12022,53(C) STRICKEN,/X:COURT RESENTENCES THE DEFENDANT AS FOLLOWS:/AJW/CH4:SP 11Y:U/DEF:IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 1, PC192(A), TO 11 YEARSIN STATE PRISON/ENH:CH1:TYPE 12022,5(A)PC:TI 10Y:CS/DEF:IS SENTENCED ONCOUNT 2, PC245(A)2, TO 1 YEAR IN STATE PRISON, ONE THIRD OF THE MID TERM, CONSECUTIVE/ENH:CH2:TYPE 12022,5(A)PC:TI 16M:CS/X:TOTAL STATE PRISON = 23YEARS & 4 MONTHS,/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED IN THE AMOUNT TO BE CALCULATD BY CDCR/CTORD:SENTENCE DEEMED SERVED/DEF:WAIVES ANY EXCESS CREDITS TO THE EXTENT OF ALLOWING A STANDARD PAROLE SUPERVISION/X:COURT FURTHER ORDERS VICTIM RESTITUTION, FINES & FEES DEEMED REMITTED,/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO PAROLE AS DIRECTED BY CDCR/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/

/CAL HEARING ON PC1170(D) PETITION (CDC #P70492)/X NICOLE FULLER APPEARSOR THE PEOPLE,/DEF:APPEARS VIA ZOOM FROM CALIFORNIA MEN'S COLONY IN SAN LUIS OBISPO/X:VICTIM'S SISTER, SYLVIA STRATFORD, MAKES IMPACT STATEMENT VIAZOOM,/X:COURT READS PORTION OF LETTER FROM KRISTINA WYCKOFF ON THE RECORD,/X:COURT STATE REASONS AND GRANTS PEOPLE'S PETITION TO RESENTENCE PURSUANTTO PC1170(D),/

/LIFE2 1/X DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 652 DAYS//X:COUNTY JAIL, 97 SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 749 DAYS,/2933,1(C)//ENH:CH1:TYPEPC12022,53(C):TI240M:CS/ENH:CH2:TYPEPC12022,5(A):TI16M:CS//ENH:CH1:TYPEPC12022,5(A):TI48M:S/TEXT:TOTAL 37 YEARS AND 4 MONTHS TO LIFE//STATES/VF5:10,000/PAR/APPEAL/CDC/

/TEXT/TRIAL PHASE VERDICT/TRL PHASE VT/CAL JURY TRIAL//X:AT 2:18 P,M,, JURY REACHES A VERDICT AS FOLLOWS://X:GUILTY-187PC IN THE SECOND DEGREE AND ALLEGATION USING FIREARM TO//X:WIT A HANDGUN TO BE TRUE AND DISCHARGING A FIREARM ALSO TRUE,/X:NOT GUILTY- 187 1ST DEGREE,/X:GUILTY-245(A)(2)PC AND USING A FIREARM TO BE TRUE,//X:NOT GUILTY - 148(A)PC,/SENTENCING/PRES:02-16-00/
/CAL:FURTHER PROCEEDING ON PC1170(D), CDC #P70492/X:THE PEOPLE, PUBLIC DEFENDER AND DEFEDANT APPEARED VIA ZOOM,/CONT/
/CAL:TO SET MOTION TO RESENTENCE PER PC1170(D)/DAWT/CONTD:HEARING ON PC1170(D) PETITION/
/CAL:TO SET MOTION TO RESENTENCE PUR PC1170(D)1/PD/DAWT/CONTD:TO SET MOTTO RESENTENCE PUR PC1170(D)1 IN DEPT, 25/
/X:CAUSE ON CALENDAR IN ERROR, THE MATTER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR,/
CONT TO 2/1/00 FOR JURY DELIB AT 10AM IN D28
/TEXT/TRIAL PHASE PRESENTATION OF DEFENSE EXHIBITS WITNESSES/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAW/DEFTARR/
HTA, BS $100,000, MISD CERT TO SUP CT
DA MOT CONT PX GRTD BASE ON GOO CAUSE FINDING BY THE COURT
MOT TO CONT PX-GRANTED,DA IN TRIAL
